# AI Factory Capital Flow

Last Updated: 2026-06-01

---

## Core Principle

资本不会同时流向所有环节。

通常按照产业链顺序扩散。

研究重点：

谁是下一棒。

---

## Stage 1

Compute

Companies:

NVDA

AMD

TSM

Signal:

GPU Demand Explosion

---

## Stage 2

Networking

Companies:

ANET

AVGO

Signal:

Cluster Size Growth

Bandwidth Bottleneck

---

## Stage 3

Optical

Companies:

CRDO

LITE

COHR

Signal:

Optical Attach Rate Rising

---

## Stage 4

NeoCloud

Companies:

CRWV

NBIS

APLD

IREN

CORZ

Signal:

GPU Utilization Rising

Cloud Pricing Power

---

## Stage 5

Cooling

Companies:

VRT

Signal:

Rack Density Rising

Liquid Cooling Adoption

---

## Stage 6

Power

Companies:

ETN

GEV

ABB

Signal:

Electrical Infrastructure Bottlenecks

---

## Stage 7

Energy

Companies:

CEG

VST

NRG

Signal:

Power Demand Growth

PPA Activity

---

## Stage 8

Applications

Examples:

AI Agents

Coding

Search

Enterprise AI

Signal:

Inference Revenue

Enterprise Adoption

---

## Current Working Hypothesis

2023

GPU

2024

GPU
↓
Networking

2025

GPU
↓
Networking
↓
Optical
↓
NeoCloud

2026+

GPU
↓
Networking
↓
Optical
↓
NeoCloud
↓
Cooling
↓
Power
↓
Energy

---

## Research Checklist

当某个环节上涨时：

1. 为什么上涨？

2. 上游是谁？

3. 下游是谁？

4. 下一棒可能是谁？

5. 哪家公司最纯？

6. 哪家公司尚未反映？
